block.title: Welcome to the Solera Networks DeepSee™ App for Splunk
block.text: This app provides a seamless workflow between your Solera DS Appliance and your Splunk instance. From an event in Splunk you can download the relevant PCAP files or to perform analysis using Solera DeepSee.

block.title: Optionally, define source-specific field names for extraction
Warning
block.text: Submitting this form can take a few moments. Please be patient and wait for it to complete before navigating away from this page.
